zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Harsnett於1570年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾賀特福德時，她的父親John Harsnett35歲，母親Elizabeth25歲。她於1596年2月2日與Ralph Thompson在英國英格蘭肯特哈利善姆結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harsnett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Harnett
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Fergus.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Harsnett was born in 1570, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Harsnett, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth, was 25. She married Ralph Thompson on 2 February 1596, in Harrietsham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1620, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Harsnettが1570年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで生まれた時，父John Harsnettは35歳，母Elizabethは25歳であった。1596年2月2日にイギリスイギリスケントハーリートシャムでRalph Thompsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Harsnett(이)가 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Harsnett(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1596년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 해리츠함에서 Ralph Thompson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Harsnett nasceu em 1570, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Harsnett, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Thompson em 2 de fevereiro de 1596, em Harrietsham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1620, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.St Andrews, Wiltshire, England: ст андрю'с чурч, ванбороую, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Harsnett родилась в 1570 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Harsnett было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Thompson 2 февраля 1596 г. в местности харриецхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1620 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Harsnett nació en 1570, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Harsnett, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ralph Thompson el 2 de febrero de 1596, en Harrietsham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1620, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
